title: Specialty Clinic Cleaning MA [Infection Control]
description: Specialty clinic cleaning for cardiology, dental, urgent care in MA. Terminal cleaning, $2M insured. Call (978) 307-8107
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 296 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, MA HIC License #213341, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.
ogDescription: Specialty clinic cleaning for cardiology, dental, urgent care in MA. Terminal cleaning, $2M insured. Call (978) 307-8107

schemas.name: Specialty Clinics
schemas.description: Professional sanitation for urgent care centers, outpatient surgery centers, therapy clinics, and specialty healthcare facilities across Massachusetts.

mainEntity.name: What does specialty clinic cleaning from Dory's include?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our specialty clinic cleaning covers procedure room disinfection, sterile field preparation areas, specialized equipment surface cleaning, patient consultation rooms, waiting areas, restroom sanitation, hard floor care, and high-touch point disinfection. We tailor protocols to the specific clinical specialty — whether dermatology, cardiology, orthopedics, oncology, or surgical centers — because each has unique sanitation requirements.

mainEntity.name: How often should a specialty clinic schedule professional cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most specialty clinics require daily cleaning at minimum, with procedure rooms needing turnover cleaning between patients. Surgical specialty clinics and infusion centers may require more frequent service. Dory's develops a customized cleaning schedule based on your procedure volume, clinic hours, and the specific infection control requirements of your specialty.

mainEntity.name: What compliance standards does Dory's follow for specialty clinic environments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dory's adheres to OSHA standards, CDC guidelines for environmental infection control in healthcare settings, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations. For surgical and procedural clinics, we follow additional terminal environmental cleaning protocols and maintain detailed cleaning logs for accreditation and inspection readiness.

mainEntity.name: Why choose Dory's for specialty clinic cleaning instead of a general environmental cleaning company?

acceptedAnswer.text: Specialty clinics have sanitation needs that go far beyond standard office cleaning. Dory's exclusively serves healthcare facilities and understands the cross-contamination risks, sterile environment requirements, and regulatory documentation specific to specialty practices. Our 22-plus years of healthcare experience means your clinic gets trained staff who know how to properly disinfect procedure rooms, handle regulated waste areas, and maintain the standards your accrediting body expects.

Professional Specialty Clinics

Specialty Clinics in Massachusetts

Professional sanitation for urgent care centers, outpatient surgery centers, therapy clinics, and specialty healthcare facilities across Massachusetts.

Call (978) 307-8107 Schedule Assessment

High-traffic clinical environments like urgent care centers and outpatient facilities require rigorous sanitation protocols that go beyond surface-level cleaning. Dory's Cleaning Services delivers terminal cleaning, between-patient room turnover, and comprehensive facility-wide disinfection.

Our team understands the pace and demands of outpatient healthcare. We coordinate with your staff to deliver rapid room turnovers during operating hours and comprehensive specialty clinic sanitation during off-hours, ensuring your facility maintains the highest standards of hygiene at all times.

With 22 years of clinical experience and $2M in insurance coverage, we are a trusted partner for Massachusetts clinics seeking reliable, compliant sanitation services.

Service Details

What's Included

  • Terminal Cleaning for Procedure Rooms
  • Between-Patient Room Turnover
  • High-Traffic Waiting Area Disinfection
  • Surgical Suite Sanitation
  • Biohazard Spill Response & Cleanup
  • Restroom & Common Area Disinfection
  • Staff Break Room & Locker Cleaning
  • Entrance & Lobby Sanitation

Ideal For

Urgent Care Centers Outpatient Surgery Centers Physical Therapy Clinics Dialysis Centers Imaging Centers Specialty Clinics

Frequently Asked Questions About Specialty Clinic Cleaning

Common questions from clinic directors and specialty practice administrators.

Our specialty clinic cleaning covers procedure room disinfection, sterile field preparation areas, specialized equipment surface cleaning, patient consultation rooms, waiting areas, restroom sanitation, hard floor care, and high-touch point disinfection. We tailor protocols to the specific clinical specialty — whether dermatology, cardiology, orthopedics, oncology, or surgical centers — because each has unique sanitation requirements.

Most specialty clinics require daily cleaning at minimum, with procedure rooms needing turnover cleaning between patients. Surgical specialty clinics and infusion centers may require more frequent service. Dory's develops a customized cleaning schedule based on your procedure volume, clinic hours, and the specific infection control requirements of your specialty.

Dory's adheres to OSHA standards, CDC guidelines for environmental infection control in healthcare settings, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations. For surgical and procedural clinics, we follow additional terminal environmental cleaning protocols and maintain detailed cleaning logs for accreditation and inspection readiness.

Specialty clinics have sanitation needs that go far beyond standard office cleaning. Dory's exclusively serves healthcare facilities and understands the cross-contamination risks, sterile environment requirements, and regulatory documentation specific to specialty practices. Our 22-plus years of healthcare experience means your clinic gets trained staff who know how to properly disinfect procedure rooms, handle regulated waste areas, and maintain the standards your accrediting body expects.
